title: rhodanthe chlorocephala subsp. rosea
intro: Rhodanthe chlorocephala subsp. rosea is an Australian native plant, also known as the Rosy Everlasting or Pink Everlasting, belonging to the daisy family. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rhodanthe chlorocephala subsp. rosea include reducing inflammation and pain, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes, as well as being used in topical applications such as creams and ointments.
